mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, name, price, level FROM course_package WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT id, course_id, name, price, level FROM course_package WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_package (course_id, name, price, level) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{level})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_package SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, level = #{level} WHERE id = #{id}
